profile_target.source: post-pass rch Criterion reprofile after frankenjax-26ao
profile_target.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ffi-profile-after-pass16 cargo bench -p fj-ffi --bench ffi_baseline -- --sample-size 40 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

change.lever: Specialize tensor Value -> FfiBuffer encoding by dtype, moving the DType dispatch out of the per-element loop while preserving per-element literal validation.

score.confidence_note: After benchmark used a different rch worker, but the measured 4.57x mean speedup is large relative to expected worker variance and all behavior proofs passed.

isomorphism_proof.ordering: The new tensor encoder iterates the same TensorValue.elements slice in the same order and writes each element immediately to the same Vec buffer.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No ordering comparisons, maps, sets, sorting, or tie-breaking logic are touched.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Floating-point literals remain bit-pattern variants; F16/BF16/F32/F64 and complex components are written with the same to_ne_bytes calls. No arithmetic, normalization, NaN canonicalization, or signed-zero conversion is introduced.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG state or sampling code exists in this path.
isomorphism_proof.error_semantics: The encoder still returns the first UnrepresentableLiteral encountered in element order. I32 still performs i32::try_from on Literal::I64 and returns UnrepresentableLiteral for out-of-range values.

validation: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ffi-check-pass17 cargo check -p fj-ffi --all-targets
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ffi-test-pass17 cargo test -p fj-ffi --all-targets (88 passed)
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ffi-clippy-pass17 cargo clippy -p fj-ffi --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ffi-rebench-pass17 cargo bench -p fj-ffi --bench ffi_baseline -- marshal/1k_tensor_to_buffer --sample-size 60 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3
